## Problem

What limitation or frustration does this address?

## Proposed solution

How should it work? Be specific about commands, output, or behavior.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why they're less ideal.

## Additional context

Any examples, screenshots, or references that help explain the idea.
